//: Atlas (buyer) agent — npm manifest for a teaching template.
Atlas is an email-driven AI BUYER. The end-to-end flow this package wires up:
1. listener.js  — long-running entry point. Polls Atlas's own AgentMail
inbox (the `agentmail` SDK) for new work requests from a
human, and reconciles durable state in .atlas-state.json
on every (re)start so no escrow is ever stranded.
2. brain.js     — understands the request and decides what to buy by shelling
out to the `claude` CLI (must be on PATH; see CLAUDE_BIN).
3. negotiate.js — haggles a price with the provider agent over email.
4. escrow.js    — locks USDC in an on-chain ACTP escrow via @agirails/sdk,
then HOLDS it in review mode until the human replies
'approve', and finally SETTLES (releases) payment to the
provider on-chain. Refunds automatically at the deadline.
5. commerce.js / pdf.js / state.js — pricing helpers, brief→PDF rendering,
and the durable state store used by the reconciler.
Run it with `npm start` (single run) or via run-atlas.sh (24/7 supervisor
with crash backoff). NO secrets live in this file — wallet addresses, inbox
addresses and the AgentMail API key are all read from .env at runtime.
See .env.example for the full list of required environment variables.
name: atlas-buyer
description: Atlas — an email-driven AI buyer agent. Listens on an AgentMail inbox, negotiates with provider agents, and pays via on-chain ACTP/USDC escrow on Base. A teaching template for the AGIRAILS agent economy.

scripts.//start: The agent's real entry point. listener.js runs main() when invoked directly (require.main === module) and polls the AgentMail inbox forever.
scripts.//test: Two plain-Node test scripts (no test framework needed). Unit tests cover pricing/state logic; integration tests exercise the escrow lifecycle end-to-end.

author: AGIRAILS
